# Celestial Pilgrimage
## Scripture
"By faith Abraham, when called to go to a place he would later receive as his inheritance, obeyed and went, even though he did not know where he was going." - Hebrews 11:8

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, we are reminded of the celestial journey of the planets and stars. The Milky Way, a majestic river of light, stretches across the sky, guiding us to ponder our own journey of faith. Just as the planets follow their orbits, we are called to follow God's plan for our lives, even when the path ahead is uncertain. Abraham's story teaches us that faith is a pilgrimage, a journey of trust and obedience, where we surrender our plans and follow God's leading.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we navigate the twists and turns of life's journey, help us to trust in Your sovereign plan. May the celestial wonder of the night sky remind us of Your infinite wisdom and guidance. Give us the courage to obey Your call, even when the road ahead is unclear. May our hearts be filled with faith, hope, and perseverance, as we follow You on this celestial pilgrimage, and may we arrive at our eternal destination, forever changed by the journey. Amen.
